texto: There was a naked jock on my bed and a thing with tentacles coming out of my toilet. One of these things did not belong, and if you tell me that it was the naked jock, you shouldn't be reading this story.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Johnny Murdoc sobre temas ligados a humor. A afirmação “There was a naked jock on my bed and a thing with tentacles coming out of my toilet. One of these…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a humor, gay, horror, útil em momentos de horror e humor.

frase_original: There was a naked jock on my bed and a thing with tentacles coming out of my toilet. One of these things did not belong, and if you tell me that it was the naked jock, you shouldn't be reading this story.
